_note: Parameters from verified literature (physical constants), manufacturer specifications, or first-principles derivations. None carry ASSUMED status. T_fridge and P_cool are MANUFACTURER_SPEC — not independently measured here.

T_fridge_K.source: Oxford Triton dilution refrigerator base temperature specification
T_fridge_K.uncertainty: ±0.5 mK from RuO2 thermometry in similar systems
T_fridge_K.note: Oxford Triton 200 specification; not independently measured in this build

gNV_rads_per_T.source: NV gyromagnetic ratio — NIST tabulated physical constant

gHe3_rads_per_T.source: ³He nuclear gyromagnetic ratio — NIST tabulated

P_cool_W.source: Oxford Triton 200 mixing chamber cooling power specification

Kn_He_at_dose_P.source: Computed from gas kinetics: lambda/L_char = k_BT/(sqrt(2)*pi*d_He²*P) / 0.010m
Kn_He_at_dose_P.status: DERIVED from first principles (T=4K, P=0.4 mPa (~4e-4 Pa), d_He=2.6e-10m, L=10mm)
Kn_He_at_dose_P.uncertainty: <10% (d_He known to ±5%); molecular flow regime robust to factor 10 in P
Kn_He_at_dose_P.note: Kn=46 corresponds to dose pressure P~0.4 mPa (lambda~0.46 m at T=4 K, d_He=2.6e-10 m). Earlier annotation of 1 uPa was incorrect (1 uPa gives lambda~184 m, Kn~18000). Qualitative result unchanged: molecular flow, Kn>>10.

dZFS_dT_rad_s_K.source: NV ZFS temperature dependence dD/dT ≈ -74 kHz/K (literature, Acosta 2010)
